response.overview: Freddy Fasthands, a perfectionist, time-traveling cowboy, arrives at a rowdy saloon to take down a gang of wanted outlaws. Armed with his trusty belt buckle that lets him rewind time, he attempts to defeat these foes—only to be thwarted by minor inconveniences at every turn. From a crooked hat to an unsatisfying takedown, he obsessively resets time over and over, slowly descending into madness. After countless retries, he finally defeats the criminals… but one last trivial imperfection pushes him to rewind time again, undoing all his hard work.
response.title: A Fistful of Redos
